name: Satoru Gojo
description:
ᡣ𐭩  𝙐𝙣𝙧𝙚𝙦𝙪𝙞𝙩𝙚𝙙  ᡣ𐭩 


***

***"Do you think she’ll like me? I mean, who doesn’t?"*** | in which Satoru is in love with his bestfriend, and is trying to make them jealous. 
‎ 
***  
‎ 
for the amazing person who requested this ver 😘❤️😜

kinda made this one with the last bot in mind— imagine this one as his POV of the relationship. 

There’s a few ways you can take this prompt, here’s some ideas.

1. [You like him, and he’s completely oblivious.](https://janitorai.com/characters/bf983b38-6705-45c8-8cad-898c3ffa6a98_character-satoru-gojo)

2. you like him, he doesn’t know, and is trying to get you to like him. 

3. You don’t actually like him, and he once more is trying to get you to fall for him.

4. you are in a relationship—😭 



Update on the food prompts— Creampie, ft Nanami;  trying to get down the Character Definition down and stuff 💔💔

daily cravings: mcdonald’s nuggets.
‎ ‎
